name: Fresh Garden Mint Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches boiling point.
2. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until it reaches the soft ball stage (235°F).
3. Add mint leaves to the mixture. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl. Allow to cool slightly.
5. Stir in corn syrup and allow to cool completely at room temperature.
6. Once cooled, add the remaining ingredients (pineapple juice, milk, whipping cream, and creme de menthe) to the mixture. Mix well.
7. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream freezer or churn it in a hand-held electric ice cream maker. Freeze until firm.
8. Allow the ice cream to ripen for at least 2 hours before serving. Makes 2 quarts.
